patch:
/tmp/PATCH_0_18ba2309.patch:23: trailing whitespace.
    
warning: 1 line adds whitespace errors.
diff --git a/asgiref/testing.py b/asgiref/testing.py
index d6ccee5..b5b45c3 100644
--- a/asgiref/testing.py
+++ b/asgiref/testing.py
@@ -67,17 +67,23 @@ class ApplicationCommunicator:
                 except asyncio.CancelledError:
                     pass
 
-    def stop(self, exceptions=True):
-        future = self._future
-        if future is None:
-            return
-
-        if not future.done():
-            future.cancel()
-        elif exceptions:
-            # Give a chance to raise any exceptions
-            future.result()
-
+    def stop (self, exceptions=True) :
+        """
+        Stops the application by cancelling the running task.
+    
+        Args:
+            exceptions: If True, exceptions will be raised. If False, exceptions
+                        will be suppressed.
+        """
+        if self._future is not None and not self._future.done():
+            self._future.cancel()
+            if exceptions:
+                # Allow the exception to propagate
+                try:
+                    self._future.result()
+                except asyncio.CancelledError:
+                    # CancelledError is expected when we cancel the task
+                    pass
     def __del__(self):
         # Clean up on deletion
         try:
diff --git a/asgiref/timeout.py b/asgiref/timeout.py
index fd5381d..d9d8e8d 100644
--- a/asgiref/timeout.py
+++ b/asgiref/timeout.py
@@ -75,12 +75,12 @@ class timeout:
         return self._cancelled
 
     @property
-    def remaining(self) -> Optional[float]:
-        if self._cancel_at is not None:
-            return max(self._cancel_at - self._loop.time(), 0.0)
-        else:
+    def remaining (self) -> Optional[float] :
+        if self._timeout is None:
             return None
-
+        if self._cancelled:
+            return 0.0
+        return max(0.0, self._cancel_at - self._loop.time())
     def _do_enter(self) -> "timeout":
         # Support Tornado 5- without timeout
         # Details: https://github.com/python/asyncio/issues/392
